title: hieracium opacum
intro: Hieracium opacum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) with yellow flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium opacum include its ability to stimulate the immune system and provide relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Hieracium opacum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
